memoryArtifacts.headline: Lady Alice Durham De Hansard Family history
memoryArtifacts.description:
Alice HANSARD  1, 2 was born 1206 in Evenwood, Durham, England.

She was the daughter of Gilbert Hansard.

She married Brian fitz Alan of Bedale [2] on 1223 in Bedale, North Riding, Yorkshire, England …

popularStory.headline: Lady Alice Durham De Hansard Family history

Alice HANSARD  1, 2 was born 1206 in Evenwood, Durham, England.

She was the daughter of Gilbert Hansard.

She married Brian fitz Alan of Bedale [2] on 1223 in Bedale, North Riding, Yorkshire, England …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Ledet於大約1249年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可時，她的父親Walter DeLedet40歲，母親Ermentrude Lisle18歲。她於1268年與William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1316年3月8日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾塞頓享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾可比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Ledet于大约1249年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可时，她的父亲Walter DeLedet40岁，母亲Ermentrude Lisle18岁。她于1268年与William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1316年3月8日在英国英格兰貝德福爾塞頓享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾可比。

nameMeanings.name: Ledet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Emile, Leonce, Angelle, Antoine, Aurelie, Camille, Etienne, Ferrel, Gillis, Gisele.

French: variant of Ledé, from le dé, meaning either ‘the thimble’ or ‘the die’, hence used as a metonymic occupational name for a stitcher or tailor, or as a nickname for a gambler. Compare Leday 1 and Ledee 2.

History: Antoine Livaudais Ledet from La Rochelle in Charente-Maritime, France, married first Marguerite Willig in Edgard, LA, in 1788, and second Victoire-Françoise Quimine in Plattenville, LA, in 1797.

variants.name: Ledee
meanings: French (Ledée and Lédée): variant of Ledé (see Ledet ). This surname is also found in the West Indies, including Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Leday
meanings: Americanized form of French   Ledet  . This surname is found mainly in LA and TX, and is borne mainly by African Americans. Compare   Lada   5.
In some cases possibly also French: variant, with fused masculine definite article le, of Day , a habitatonal name from Day in the Ardennes.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Ledet was born about 1249, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Walter DeLedet, was 40 and her mother, Ermentrude Lisle, was 18. She married William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby in 1268, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 8 March 1316, in Sutton, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Corby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Ledet est née environ 1249, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter DeLedet, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ermentrude Lisle, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby en 1268, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 mars 1316, à Sutton, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Corby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Ledet um 1249 in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter DeLedet 40 und ihre Mutter Ermentrude Lisle 18. Sie hat 1268 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. März 1316 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Sutton, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Corby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Ledet è nata il circa 1249 nel Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Walter DeLedet, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Ermentrude Lisle, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby nel 1268, nel Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 marzo 1316, nel Sutton, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Corby, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Ledetが約1249年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークで生まれた時，父Walter DeLedetは40歳，母Ermentrude Lisleは18歳であった。1268年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンでWilliam le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1316年3月8日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスットオンで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコルビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Ledet(이)가 대략 1249년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter DeLedet(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermentrude Lisle(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1268년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1316년 3월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 수턴에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 코르비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Ledet nasceu aproximadamente 1249, em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter DeLedet, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ermentrude Lisle, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby em 1268, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de março de 1316, em Sutton, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Corby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Ledet родилась около 1249 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter DeLedet было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermentrude Lisle, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby в 1268 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 8 марта 1316 г. в местности суттон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности корби, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Ledet nació aproximadamente 1249, en Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter DeLedet, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Ermentrude Lisle, tenía 18 años. Se casó con William le Latimer 1st Baron Latimer of Corby en 1268, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de marzo de 1316, en Sutton, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Corby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
